[0-4] A bright green square transitions into "eHcv" then "eHow" centered on light gray. The view shifts to deep red; a white layer peels back revealing "od", then "food" under "eHow".
[4-6] A woman in a blue sleeveless top stands behind a marble counter with a blender, brown liquid, fruit, and shaker cup, smiling broadly in a modern kitchen.
[6-8] An "eHow" box appears bottom-left. A gray lower-third banner displays white text "Chrisie Allemand" and "Licensed Nutritionist". Her expression shifts to neutral.
[8-10] The banner persists. The woman speaks with subtle mouth movements against stainless steel appliances.
[10-12] The banner vanishes, leaving the logo. The woman continues speaking facing the camera.

[12-14] A white square logo vanishes as a woman in a blue sleeveless top leans on a marble counter, followed by a cut to a close-up of a thick, pinkish-purple smoothie in a clear glass. [14-16] The scene returns to the woman in the modern kitchen; she looks down at the blender and ingredients, then lifts her gaze to speak. [16-18] She gestures with her right hand, palm facing upward, emphasizing words while standing behind the counter where a white blender, bowl of brown liquid, and plate with fruit sit. [18-26] She continues speaking, lowering her hand to rest flat on the surface near the blender and a clear shaker cup. Her hands remain on the countertop as she talks, with the stainless steel refrigerator and white cabinetry visible in the background.

[26-32] A woman in a blue sleeveless top stands behind a marble counter, speaking while resting her hands near a white blender base and a clear shaker cup filled with white liquid and ice. A container of brown puree and a white plate holding a banana slice and red strawberry pieces sit nearby. She shifts her gaze from the camera to the ingredients and back. [32-40] In a close-up, a hand lifts the shaker cup, then sets it down to drop a red strawberry piece into the liquid. The hand subsequently reaches for the banana slice on the plate, which lies next to a silver knife.

[40-46] A hand grasps a yellow banana slice from a white rectangular plate positioned next to a silver knife and drops it into a clear shaker cup containing white liquid, ice, and red strawberry pieces. The white blender base remains stationary on the marble countertop beside a container of brown puree. [46-52] A hand then holds a small packet with orange markings over the shaker cup, tilting it to pour contents into the mixture. [52-54] Simultaneously, while one hand holds the packet, the other hand uses a spoon to scoop brown puree from the plastic container sitting next to the blender base.

Between [54-62], a close-up captures a hand stirring a thick brown puree inside a plastic container with a silver spoon, positioned on a marble countertop beside a white blender base and a clear shaker cup containing white liquid, ice, and fruit. The hand lifts the spoon to add the puree to the cup. At [62], the scene shifts to a wide shot of a woman in a blue sleeveless top standing at the counter. She holds the shaker cup and, from [64-70], tilts a small packet over it with her right hand, pouring contents into the mixture of white liquid and fruit while standing near the blender base and puree container.

The woman in the blue sleeveless top stands at a marble counter next to a white blender base and a container of brown puree. From [70-80], she uses both hands to tightly screw the white blade assembly lid onto a clear shaker cup filled with white liquid and fruit, ensuring it is sealed. After securing the lid, she inverts the cup at [80-82] and aligns it with the blender base. From [82-86], she presses down on the inverted cup to activate the motor. The ingredients inside mix rapidly, transforming into a smooth pink liquid that swirls vigorously within the container as she holds it steady against the base.

[86-92] A woman in a blue sleeveless top presses an inverted clear cup onto a white blender base, blending a pink liquid mixture that swirls rapidly. A container of brown puree sits on the marble countertop nearby. The view widens to show her holding the blender and speaking.
[92-100] She lifts the clear cup off the base, twisting it to release the lock. Holding the cup with her left hand, she uses her right hand to unscrew the white blade assembly lid counter-clockwise. She completely removes the lid, holding it in her right hand while looking down into the open cup containing the pink smoothie.

[100-104] A woman in a blue sleeveless top stands behind a marble counter, holding a clear cup filled with pink liquid in one hand and a detached white blade lid in the other. She places the lid onto a white rectangular plate on the counter.
[104-110] She raises the cup to her lips with her right hand to drink the smoothie, tilting the container back while her left arm rests on the surface near a white blender base and a container of brown puree.
[110-116] After finishing her sip, she lowers the cup, smiles at the camera, and sets the container down next to the blender base. She then rests both hands on the counter and speaks directly to the viewer.
